issues.title: Copilot CLI: node missing in AWF chroot
AWF binary install: 502 from github.com releases
Smoke CI agent job cancelled by timeout
issues.notes: Agent conclusion=cancelled, timeout_detected=true on push events with no PR context (~1.1m). Other Smoke CI runs same window succeeded in 3-5m.

issues.title: Chaos PR Bundle Fuzzer safe_outputs job fails after agent success
issues.notes: Agent 6.1m success; safe_outputs 41s failure. Check schema validation, payload size, permissions.

issues.title: Daily Code Metrics upload_assets fails after successful agent
issues.notes: Agent 13.9m / $3.66 success; upload_assets 42s failure. Check assets branch permissions or size cap.

issues.title: Smoke Pi 91% blocked; smoke agents probe google domains
issues.notes: Smoke Pi 20/22 blocked (api-proxy:10000, api-proxy:10002). Smoke Claude/Codex/Copilot agents hit accounts.google.com, content-autofill.googleapis.com, safebrowsingohttpgateway.googleapis.com.
